meta.title: S1 E1: This Week in Spaceflight History  -  Myasishchev VM-T Atlant (Jan 6, 1982)
meta.description:
Each week I take The Orbital Mechanics podcast's series "This week in Spaceflight History" and I recreate the mission in Kerbal Space Program with my friend Jacob. This week's mission was to fly the Myasishchev VM-T Atlant with cargo from one runway to another runway. 

Tune in LIVE ever Wednesday at 9:00 Central (3:00 UTC) to join the action at http://twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

Make sure and check out the Orbital Mechanics Podcast each week to get the run down on the mission!
